title: ValidatorDecision
description: An immutable validator or watcher verdict over a replay, quarantine, or session outcome, suitable for quorum aggregation and receipt linkage.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

callId.description: Identifier of the call or transition being judged by this validator.

sessionId.description: Optional URN of the agent session associated with this decision.

receiptId.description: Optional URN of the session receipt this decision contributes to.

quorumGroup.description: Optional identifier of the quorum group or validator set used to interpret this verdict.

verdict.description: Validator outcome over the replay, quarantine, or execution state.

signer.description: Stable identifier for the validator or watcher that produced the decision.

roles.description: Roles held by the signer when making this decision, e.g. validator, watchdog, witness.

evidenceRefs.description: References to replay envelopes, audit anchors, quarantine receipts, logs, or other evidence consulted.

rationale.description: Optional human-readable explanation of the decision.

decidedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this decision was issued.

decisionHash.description: sha256: prefixed hash of the canonical decision payload for tamper evidence.
